title: Xtra Crunchy Ethiopian Beef Kitfo
description: A fatty and crunchy Ethiopian dish made with brown rice and nimono-simmer, this macrobiotic-friendly kitfo is a light and flavorful meal option. It features tender beef and a variety of spices.

ingredients.name: beef
ingredients.notes: fatty cuts like ribeye or brisket work best

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is lightly browned and crispy.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef to the skillet and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the berbere spice and nimono broth to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the mixture for 10 minutes.
Stir in the cooked brown rice and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the kitfo hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
